no-restricted-syntax.message: Direct Hiro API URL not allowed. Use stacksApiFetch() from lib/stacks-api-fetch.ts with STACKS_API_BASE / STACKS_API_TESTNET_BASE from lib/identity/constants.ts.
Direct Hiro API URL not allowed. Use stacksApiFetch() from lib/stacks-api-fetch.ts with STACKS_API_BASE / STACKS_API_TESTNET_BASE from lib/identity/constants.ts.
